snps.effect_template: HLA-DRB1 region. Major MHC risk locus for systemic lupus erythematosus.
PTPN22 R620W. Shared autoimmune susceptibility variant.

recommendation_template: Sun protection is critical (UV can trigger flares). Avoid smoking. Regular monitoring of kidney function and blood counts if at elevated risk.

studies.title: Genome-wide association study in systemic lupus erythematosus
studies.finding: HLA region and PTPN22 confirmed as major SLE risk loci
